name: dreamactor-m2.0
description: Animate any character, humans, cartoons, animals, even non-humans, from a single image + driving video

cut_first_second.description: Whether to crop the first second of the output video (removes the 1-second transition at the beginning).
cut_first_second.title: Cut First Second

image.description: Input image containing a human subject. Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG. Max size: 4.7 MB. Resolution: 480x480 to 1920x1080.
image.title: Image

video.description: Template video whose motion, facial expressions, and lip movements will be applied to the image subject. Supported formats: MP4, MOV, WebM. Max duration: 30 seconds. Resolution: 200x200 to 2048x1440.
video.title: Video
